Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection after the execution of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all variants where it appears
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-EIC Reject in variants ending with rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Checklist Completed in variants where checklist completion occurs after AE assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurs

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Average time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers after the execution of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time until SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is performed after SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total waiting time to the SW-Reviewer Agreed following SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants involving AE recommendation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation for cases where activity SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that lead to major revision versus those that lead to acceptance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and Manuscript Export Succeeded when export occurs post-assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity Manuscript Export Succeeded for cases where activity Manuscript Export Succeeded occurs

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in fast-tracked cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in relation to the preceding activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'
